summary: Luxury Life 80/20 split bug testing completed. The bug has been FIXED. Mining rewards and tap game now correctly apply 80% to wallet and 20% to luxury savings. Verified with user mail2avhale@gmail.com (UID: 73b95483-f36b-4637-a5ee-d447300c6835).
critical_code_review_comments: The 80/20 split logic in claim_mined_rewards (line 4063-4080) is correctly implemented
process_luxury_savings function (line 33012-33114) correctly calculates 4% mobile, 6% bike, 10% car
Tap game (line 4542-4551) also correctly applies the 80/20 split
Debug logs at line 4069-4080 help trace the luxury savings calculation

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 tests passed, 1 skipped due to daily tap limit)

seed_data_creation: Used existing user mail2avhale@gmail.com for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Luxury Life 80/20 split is working correctly. Mining rewards claim and tap game both deduct 20% for luxury savings (4% mobile, 6% bike, 10% car). User receives 80% in wallet. The bug was previously present (see mining_history entries before 14:22:08 on 2026-01-26 showing luxury=0) but has been fixed.

bug_verification.reported_issue: User reported 100% going to wallet, 0% to luxury savings when claiming 107.97 PRC mining rewards
bug_verification.root_cause: The luxury savings logic was not being applied correctly in earlier code versions

verification_tests.details: Claimed 12.5994 PRC total, 10.0795 PRC (80%) to wallet, 2.5199 PRC (20%) to luxury savings
10 taps earned 20.0 PRC total, 16.0 PRC (80%) to wallet, 4.0 PRC (20%) to luxury savings
luxury_savings collection correctly updated with mobile_savings, bike_savings, car_savings
Claim response includes luxury_savings object with deducted amount and breakdown

evidence.mining_history_after_fix: Entries at 14:22:08 and later show luxury=1.3954, 2.5199, etc.
